name: org-cli
description: Task capture, scheduling, and linked knowledge in org-mode files via the org CLI.

db.description: Path to the SQLite database (defaults to <dir>/.org.db)

orgBin.description: Path to the org CLI binary

inboxFile.description: Filename for new captures (relative to dir)

dir.label: Workspace Directory
dir.help: Your org workspace — tasks, projects, and inbox.org.

roamDir.label: Roam Directory
roamDir.help: Where knowledge-graph nodes live. Defaults to <dir>/roam.

db.label: Database
db.help: SQLite database for roam + index. Defaults to <dir>/.org.db.

orgBin.label: org CLI Binary
orgBin.help: Path to the `org` binary. Must be on PATH or set to an absolute path.

inboxFile.label: Inbox File
inboxFile.help: Filename new captures are added to, relative to the workspace directory.
